zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Berkeley於大約1437年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾拉格藍時，她的父親Sir James Berkeley44歲，母親Isabelle de Mowbray42歲。她於大約1465年與William Trye在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1498年在英國格盧斯特斯爾哈德維其可享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Berkeley于大约1437年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾拉格藍时，她的父亲Sir James Berkeley44岁，母亲Isabelle de Mowbray42岁。她于大约1465年与William Trye在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1498年在英国格盧斯特斯爾哈德維其可享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Berkeley was born about 1437, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Sir James Berkeley, was 44 and her mother, Isabelle de Mowbray, was 42. She married William Trye about 1465, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1498, in Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 62.

fr.Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales: Raglan, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Berkeley est née environ 1437, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir James Berkeley, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Mowbray, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé William Trye environ 1465, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1498, à Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Berkeley um 1437 in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Berkeley 44 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Mowbray 42. Sie hat um 1465 in England, United Kingdom William Trye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1498 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Berkeley è nata il circa 1437 nel Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir James Berkeley, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Mowbray, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato William Trye circa 1465, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1498, nel Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Berkeley(이)가 대략 1437년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Berkeley(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Mowbray(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 대략 1465년 영국 잉글랜드에서 William Trye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 영국 그루스스터실르 하르드윅에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com William Trye aproximadamente 1465, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1498, em Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Berkeley родилась около 1437 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir James Berkeley было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Mowbray, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Trye около 1465 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1498 г. в местности хардвикк, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.
